race.comment: FEAZABEEL (2) handled the heavy deck on resumption at Nowra when beaten 1.2L over 1400m. Out to the mile now looks a good move and her last two efforts have both been strong on the wet ground. Collett rides now and she makes plenty of appeal with that run under her belt. ROULADEN (6) comes through the same race as FEAZABEEL where he sat handy and finished 1L off the winner. JVO takes the ride now and he comes here with plenty of upside. Can sit handy again from the outset and won't be far away. SHE CAN SALSA (12) finished off strongly over this trip at Kembla Grange and should appreciate coming back to country level today. Third-up now, she has plenty of upside and a forward showing is on the cards. MUCHOBOR (4) improved nicely over 1300m last start and can raise the bar again out in trip.
